# GitLab Server Error Handling Test

env GOCOVERDIR=$WORK/covdata
mkdir $WORK/covdata

# Test error handling with invalid arguments
exec timeout 30s go run . <<EOF
{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": 1, "method": "initialize", "params": {"protocolVersion": "2024-11-05", "capabilities": {"tools": {}}, "clientInfo": {"name": "test", "version": "1.0"}}}
{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": 2, "method": "tools/call", "params": {"name": "search_repositories", "arguments": {}}}
EOF

stderr 'invalid arguments'

# Test error handling with missing required fields
exec timeout 30s go run . <<EOF
{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": 1, "method": "initialize", "params": {"protocolVersion": "2024-11-05", "capabilities": {"tools": {}}, "clientInfo": {"name": "test", "version": "1.0"}}}
{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": 2, "method": "tools/call", "params": {"name": "create_issue", "arguments": {"project_id": "123"}}}
EOF

stderr 'invalid arguments'
